content:
{"cards": [{"name": "Defective Labor Drone", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Artifact Creature — Automaton", "oracle_text": "Malfunction 1 (This permanent enters tapped with 1 malfunction counter on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a malfunction counter from it.)", "flavor_text": ""It keeps trying to mine the ceiling. We've explained gravity to it seventeen times." —Foreman Krix", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "keywords": ["Malfunction"], "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Common white artifact creature with above-rate stats (3/2 for 2 mana). The malfunction delay balances the aggressive statline. White gets efficient creatures in this set when they have temporal drawbacks."}, {"name": "Unstable Welding Unit", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Artifact Creature — Construct", "oracle_text": "Malfunction 1 (This permanent enters tapped with 1 malfunction counter on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a malfunction counter from it.)
Haste", "flavor_text": "The sparks it produces are either welding material or a countdown to explosion. Usually both.", "power": "4", "toughness": "2", "keywords": ["Malfunction", "Haste"], "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Common red artifact creature with above-rate stats (4/2 haste for 3 mana). Haste helps offset the malfunction delay slightly, but it still enters tapped. Classic red aggressive creature with a meaningful drawback."}, {"name": "Salvage Processing Matrix", "mana_cost": "{3}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "Malfunction 2 (This permanent enters tapped with 2 malfunction counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a malfunction counter from it.)
When the last malfunction counter is removed from ~, scavenge 4. (Look at the top 4 cards of your library. You may put an artifact card from among them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.)", "flavor_text": "Once fully operational, it can sort through debris faster than a dozen scavengers. Getting it operational is the hard part.", "keywords": ["Malfunction", "Scavenge"], "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Uncommon blue artifact that rewards patience. The scavenge 4 payoff when it comes online ties into the set's artifact themes. Two-turn delay makes the payoff appropriately powerful for uncommon."}, {"name": "Rampaging Siege Engine", "mana_cost": "{4}{R}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Construct", "oracle_text": "Malfunction 2 (This permanent enters tapped with 2 malfunction counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a malfunction counter from it.)
When the last malfunction counter is removed from ~, ~ deals 3 damage to any target.
Trample", "flavor_text": "It takes time to remember which end of itself does the destroying.", "power": "6", "toughness": "4", "keywords": ["Malfunction", "Trample"], "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Uncommon red creature with strong stats and a damage trigger when it comes online. The 3 damage bolt provides immediate board impact to compensate for the 2-turn delay. Trample makes it a real threat once active."}, {"name": "Experimental Thought Engine", "mana_cost": "{2}{U}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Artifact Creature — Construct", "oracle_text": "Malfunction 3 (This permanent enters tapped with 3 malfunction counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a malfunction counter from it.)
{2}{U}, {T}: Remove a malfunction counter from target permanent you control.
Whenever you remove a malfunction counter from a permanent you control, draw a card.", "flavor_text": ""It's learning to fix itself. And us. And everything else, whether we want it to or not." —Dr. Vess", "power": "3", "toughness": "5", "keywords": ["Malfunction"], "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rare blue build-around that manipulates malfunction counters and provides card draw payoffs. The activated ability lets you accelerate malfunction removal, and the triggered ability rewards any counter manipulation. Creates interesting synergies with other malfunction permanents."}]}
